speaker: Seeker
text: Papa ne aaj announce kar diya ki mere hone wale sasural wale ab humare saath hi rahenge taaki meri 'umar' nikalne se pehle shaadi pakki ho jaye. Main college khatam karna chahti hoon par chup-chap sab maan liya hai taaki rishtedaron mein koi tamasha na bane.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational sacrifice of giving up dreams for family peace.
text: Tumhare apne college ke sapne hain, par papa ki izzat aur rishton ko bachane ke liye tumne khud ki aawaz ko peeche rakh diya...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, I mean I really want to complete my degree. Agar main boli toh bohot bada kalesh ho jayega ghar mein. I just feel so stuck.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of causing a scene or dishonor.
text: Ghar mein achanak se koi bawal na mach jaye ya papa ka sir neecha na ho jaye, bas isi darr ne tumhe rok rakha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Unko lagta hai meri umar nikal rahi hai. Meri friends apne career ke bare mein soch rahi hain aur main bas sasural walo ke aage jhuk rahi hu. Chup-chap sab maan liya hai maine.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the long-term impact on her life compared to her peers.
text: Apni doston ko aage badhte dekh kar, is life-long commitment ke baare mein sochne ka poora waqt bhi tumhe nahi mil paa raha...

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi waqt nahi hai mere paas. I feel like my voice doesn't even matter in my own house. Bas Papa ne bol diya toh final hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question after two restatements to probe the deepest pain.
text: Apni khud ki zindagi mein apni hi aawaz ko itna dabta hua dekhna... is waqt tumhare andar sabse zyada kis baat ka dard uth raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dard is baat ka hai ki I don't have a future. And I can't ask for time because then log kya kahenge ki ladki haath se nikal gayi? Sab yahi tamasha dekhenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue response: short restatement of the duty frame, soft pause.
text: Ek achi beti hone ki saari duties mein tumhari apni aawaz bilkul shant ho gayi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur is shanti mein main ghut rahi hu. Mere sapno ka kya hoga? Bas Papa ka sir uncha rakhne ke liye main apna sab kuch maar du?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed feeling of being trapped due to relational preservation.
text: Lagta hai is zabardasti ke faisle aur rishton ko bachane ki poori zimmewari ne tumhe andar se poori tarah trapped aur helpless bana diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot trapped feel kar rahi hu. Mujhe weak feel hota hai ki main apne liye ek word bhi nahi bol pa rahi, bas aansu aa rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the mild risk flag with validation, normalising her tears and lack of weakness.
text: Aise ghutan ke mahol mein rona aana aur khud ko helpless feel karna bilkul normal hai. Humari samaj mein betiyon pe izzat ka bojh itna bhaari hota hai, par is dabav mein dabna tumhari weakness bilkul nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Pata nahi ye 'izzat' ka bojh aur kitna sehna padega. Maine toh chup-chap sab maan liya hai, par andar se bahut gussa aata hai kabhi kabhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic pattern of silencing women to keep peace in Indian families.
text: Ghar mein shanti banaye rakhne ke liye apni iccha maarna bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki badon ke aage bolna hamare yahan badtameezi maani jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi badtameezi ka tag nahi chahiye mujhe. But I want to save my college at least. Aage ka kuch samajh nahi aa raha, aap batao ab main kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe separating education from being against the family.
text: Humari society mein education aur shaadi ko aksar ek doosre ke khilaf khada kar diya jata hai, jabki apni padhai poori karne ki iccha rakhna kisi bhi parivaar ke khilaf jaana nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat main unko kaise samjhau? Direct bolungi toh kalesh hoga. Is there any smart way to handle this without making a scene?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing gentle, respectful options that fit her duty-bound persona.
text: Do choti cheezein hum dekh sakte hain: Pehla, ghar mein kisi support system (jaise bua ya mummy) ko apni padhai ka fayda samjhana. Dusra, sirf exams tak ki chhutti ya extension maangna indirect tareeqe se.

speaker: Seeker
text: Badi bua actually is weekend aa rahi hain. Unhone apni beti ko padhaya tha. Maybe I can talk to her, par darr lag raha hai ki unka reaction kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the suggestion into one tiny immediate step.
text: Pehle bas Bua ko ek safe jagah dekh kar apni padhai aur exams ki chinta thodi share karna... baaki shaadi ya papa ke baare mein abhi kuch mat nikalna, bas itna hi koshish karna shuru mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh theek rahega. Direct shaadi ka topic laane se acha hai main sirf apne subjects ki tension unse discuss karu. But again, chup-chap sab maan liya hai maine ab tak, ekdum se bolungi toh ajeeb lag sakta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the fear of changing the relational dynamic.
text: Itne waqt se jo baatein dil mein daba kar rakhi hain, unhe pehli baar kisi ke saamne laane ka khayal ek naya darr paida kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, darr toh hai. Par ab lag raha hai ki aage badhna hi padega warna life ruin ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the feeling of agency and hope mixed with fear.
text: Darr aur umeed dono ka ek sath aana... izzat ke is chakkar se nikal kar apni padhai ke liye yeh chota sa kadam uthane ka soch kar, is waqt kaisa mehsoos ho raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka feel ho raha hai. I guess I have a plan for Sunday now. Maybe Bua will understand my perspective.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her intelligence and maturity in handling the situation.
text: Ek achi beti hone ki saari boundaries maintain karte hue, jis samajhdari se tum rishton ki izzat aur apna rasta dono balance kar rahi ho, woh waqai tumhari maturity dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I really hope my maturity pays off. Papa ko directly hurt karna mera motive nahi hai. I just want my degree.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a second systemic reframe on how degrees help family honor.
text: Education complete karna asal mein aage chalkar ghar walo ke liye hi ek support banta hai, yeh baat dheere-dheere elders ko bhi samajh aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly! I will mention to Bua how a degree will make me a better match eventually. It's a win-win.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her use of the feared consequence to her advantage.
text: Jis sasural aur society ki baaton se tumhe dar lag raha tha, ab tum usi mindset ko strategically apne sapne bachane ke liye use karna seekh rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes! Maine toh soch liya tha sab khatam ho gaya. Chup-chap sab maan liya hai ka matlab yeh nahi ki dimag lagana band kar du.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting her shift from helplessness to active planning.
text: Bina kalesh kiye aur apni helplessness se bahar aakar, apni education ke liye yeh strategy sochne ka confidence andar se kaisa lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut empowering lag raha hai. It's just a small step, but at least I am trying instead of just crying in my room.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift over time from suffering to action.
text: Itne lambe samay se jo dard tum akele seh rahi thi, aaj usko ek positive action mein badalta dekhna ek bohot bada shift hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Sunday ko bas himmat karke thodi baat chhedni hai bua se. Thank you for validating my feelings.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her right to support and concluding.
text: Tum is support ki poori hakdaar thi, aur Sunday tak ka waqt khud ko thoda aaram dene aur is naye confidence ko settle hone ke liye istamaal karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Definitely. Main thoda relax karungi aur stress nahi lungi. I know my limits now, and I will be respectful but firm.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing summary of her duty and strength.
text: Ek pyari beti hone ke sath-sath ab apne khud ke future ke liye ek mazboot awaz banna... yeh safar tumne bohot himmat se shuru kiya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar mein in-laws ke permanently aane ki baat sunkar mera dum ghut raha hai, par unke samne muskurana meri majboori hai kyunki ladke wale pehle hi meri age ko lekar nakhre kar rahe hain. Agar maine abhi virodh kiya toh log kahenge ki ladki ke 'sanskar' kharab hain aur rishta haath se nikal jayega. Maine apne career ke sapne daba diye hain taaki parivaar ki maryada bani rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the helplessness of maintaining family peace at her own expense.
text: Aapke andar itni ghutan hai, phir bhi unke aage aapko sab kuch theek dikhana pad raha hai taaki is naye rishte mein aur parivaar mein koi aanch na aaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul. Agar maine abhi virodh kiya toh log kahenge ki iske sanskar kharab hain. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kaise manage karungi sab. Office ka kaam aur phir ghar pe unka taana, sab ek sath.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the implied fear of being judged for one mistake.
text: Yeh 'sanskar' kharab hone ka tag milne ka darr aapko roke hue hai, jaise aapse ek galti hui aur sab kuch hath se nikal jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi baat hai. Pehle hi meri age ko lekar ladke wale sunate hain. Meri promotion due thi, par maine khud hi step back kar liya ki working hours badh gaye toh in-laws kya kahenge. Muskurana meri majboori hai bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on the duration of her suppressing her own career aspirations.
text: Pichle kuch waqt se aap lagatar apne aap ko, aur apne career ki growth ko peechhe rakhti aa rahi hain, sirf isliye taaki baki sab log khush rahein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur koi option nahi hai na. Agar kuch bolti hoon toh meri hi family mujhe samjhati hai ki thoda adjust kar lo, sab theek ho jayega. Par andar hi andar gussa bhi aata hai aur bechaini bhi hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting her to explore what happens to the anger she just named.
text: Yeh jo andar ki bechaini aur gussa hai, jab family bhi har bar adjust karne ko kehti hai, toh aap in jazbaaton ko kahan nikal pati hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kahin nahi. Bas chup reh leti hoon ya akele mein ro leti hoon. Pura din meetings attend karti hoon aur phir aake thaki hui kitchen sambhalti hoon. Aisa lagta hai meri apni koi aukaat hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific feeling of being trapped according to the formula for C3+Relational_Preservation.
text: Lagta hai aap is dohre bojh mein poori tarah se trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan na ghar pe apni marzi chalti hai aur na apne kaam par.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi baat hai. Main completely trapped hi hoon. Rishta toh karna hi padega, age nikal rahi hai. Par in-laws ke aane se saans lena bhi mushkil ho jayega. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab kuch chhod ke kahin bohut door chali jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Holding phase for safety check due to moderate risk flag.
text: Sab kuch chhod kar door chale jane ka khayal batata hai ki apne aaspas ke logon ke dabaav ne aapko kitna tod diya hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan main theek hoon, aap pareshan mat ho. Bas flow mein bol diya. Main kahin jaungi nahi, mere parents ki izzat ka kya hoga phir. Wahi parivaar ki maryada ka chakkar mujhe rok leta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her struggle of balancing work and family expectations as culturally normal after confirming mild safety.
text: Tumhara yahan theek hona sabse zaroori hai. Hamare yahan ek working woman se ghar aur office dono jagah perfection ki umeed karna aur usko izzat ke sath jodna bohut aam hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki aapka struggle aur thakawat real nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Struggle bohut real hai. Meri office ki friend bhi yahi kehti hai. Par uske parents thoda open hain. Mere parents ke samne toh muskurana meri majboori hai. Main unko meri wajah se dukhi nahi dekh sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising her situation using the mandatory systemic anecdote format.
text: Working women mein apne aapko peeche rakh kar apne parivaar ki shanti banaye rakhna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabse ek 'adarsh beti' banne ki umeed ki jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Adarsh beti, aur ab adarsh bahu... isi chakkar mein meri poori life nikal jayegi lagta hai. Pata nahi is phansi hui halat se bahar kaise niklungi bina kisi ko hurt kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the pressure as a structural societal issue rather than her personal obligation.
text: Societal pressure hi aisa hota hai jo auraton ko yeh sikha deta hai ki unki apni zarooraton se zyada doosron ki maryada matter karti hai, isliye aapko lagta hai sabko theek rakhna sirf aapki hi zimmedari hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap bilkul sahi keh rahe ho. Par ab kya karoon? In-laws toh aa hi rahe hain aur rishta bhi waise hi chalega. Main khud ko kaise sambhalun aage ke liye bina scene create kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable options that fit into her restrictive daily life.
text: Jab aap tayar hon, toh hum do choti cheezein soch sakte hain. Pehla, kya aap apne din mein 10 minute sirf apne liye nikal sakti hain, jaise subah chai peete waqt? Ya dusra, apne office ke time ko ek safe space ki tarah use karein jahan aap sirf apne career ka sochein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Office mein wese hi thoda theek lagta hai kyunki laptop samne hota hai. Par ghar pe 10 minute khud ke liye nikalna in-laws ke samne ajeeb lagega ki main akele baithe chai pee rahi hoon aur baaki log ghoom rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the suggestion into a highly specific, low-effort step she can do out of sight.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki subah uthne ke baad ya sone se pehle, jab sab apne kamo mein hon, sirf 5 minute bathroom ya balcony mein akele khade ho jao… phir wahan bas apni saans par dhyan do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh try kar sakti hoon. Bathroom toh ek safe jagah hai waise bhi, wahan koi taana nahi marega. Wahan rone ki jagah thoda deep breathing kar lungi. Par in ladke wale logon ka kya karoon jo mere har minute ka hisaab chahte hain?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty-bound feeling of having to answer to her in-laws for her time.
text: Bahar walon ki expectations poori karna ek majboor duty jaisa ho gaya hai, jahan aapke apne time ki ahmiyat unke samne kuch nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aaj hi meri hone wali saas ka phone aaya tha aur unhone poocha ki sham ko kitne baje free hoti ho. Maine darr ke maare 6 baje bol diya jabki mera office shift 7 baje khatam hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the feared consequence of telling the truth about her work hours.
text: Yeh jo darr tha ki agar aap 7 baje ka sach bol dengi, toh wahan se kya reaction aata jis se aap itna bachna chahti thi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi sanskar aur maryada wali baatein sunne ko milti. Mere baare mein kahenge ki iska focus toh sirf office pe hai, ghar nahi sambhal payegi. Muskurana meri majboori hai aur baat taal di, par mujhe apne aap pe sharam aati hai ki main itni weak kyun hoon jo stand nahi le pati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Following stigma protocol with a gentle, shorter restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Apne hi aap ko weak samajhna aur is baat par sharam aana ki aap unse seedhi behes nahi kar paa rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... par shayad aapke sath baat karke ab thoda samajh aa raha hai ki yeh weakness nahi hai. Main sirf jhagda avoid kar rahi hoon. Main apne parents ke mental peace ke liye yeh sab jhel rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her avoidance of conflict as a culturally grounded sign of care, not weakness.
text: Bilkul, jhagde ko taalne ki koshish karna aur apne maa-baap ke baare mein itna sochna aapki care dikhata hai. Aapne jo itne saal apne parivaar ke aaram ke liye kiya hai, wo aapki weakness nahi, strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Yeh sunkar sach mein thoda bojh halka hua dimag se. Shayad mujhe unki har baat dil pe nahi leni chahiye. Jo 5 minute wala idea aapne diya tha, main usko aaj raat se hi try karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the pressure of pre-wedding expectations as an external societal structure.
text: Shaadi ke aas paas ladkiyon par har choti baat ko perfect rakhne ka pressure humari society mein systemic hai, isme aapka har pal muskurana laazmi lagne lagta hai, par haqeeqat mein yeh sirf ek dabaav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha bilkul. Yeh bas ek dabaav hai jise main sach maan baithi thi aur apni life roke baithi thi. Main dreere dreere unki baaton ko thoda lightly lene ki aadat dalungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her resolve to not let the pressure dominate her time going forward.
text: Aage aane wale dinon mein, aap is dabaav ko apne oopar utna haavi nahi hone dena chahti jitna wo pichle kuch waqt se raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi hone dungi ab. At least apne dimaag mein thoda distance rakhungi, physically beshak samne na bol pau. Muskurana meri majboori hai, par andar se shant rehna meri apni choice honi chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her realization of maintaining inner peace while fulfilling outward obligations.
text: Bahar se parivaar ke liye shanti banaye rakhna, lekin andar se khud ko is ghutan se bachaye rakhne ka ek chota aur apna rasta aap khud nikal rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Mere paas ek purani diary bhi rakhi hai, shayad raat ko sone se pehle usme apne thode thoughts aur gussa nikal liya karoon taaki aage bechaini na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Encouraging her to reflect on how the diary will serve as an emotional outlet.
text: Diary likhne ka yeh naya vichar aapko us bechaini ke time pe kis tarah se madad kar sakta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sab kuch apne tak rakhne se mujhe ghutan hoti thi. Jab paper pe apna man likh dungi toh shayad dimag halka ho jayega. Ek private outlet mil jayega meri frustration ko bina kisi se lade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her idea and suggesting a small positive addition to her journaling habit.
text: Diary ek bohut acha private safe space ban sakti hai. Aap chahein toh usme siraf apne bure khayal nikal sakti hain, ya phir agle din ke office ke kaam ki koi choti achi baat bhi likh sakti hain, jo aapko apne sapno se jode rakhe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti
text: Papa ne kaha ki 22 saal ki umar mein agar shaadi nahi hui toh main 'expired' maani jaungi, isliye ab future in-laws yahi reh kar meri monitor karenge. Mujhe lagta hai meri padhai barbaad ho jayegi, par main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti kyunki beti ka farz hamesha jhuk kar rehna hota hai. Bas yehi soch kar chup hoon ki meri bagawat se kahin Papa ki heart condition na bigad jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict and the helplessness of not being able to speak up due to family duty.
text: Yeh sunna kitna mushkil hoga ki aapke future in-laws ab aapko roz monitor karenge, aur aap chah kar bhi apne sapnon ke liye unke samne apni baat nahi rakh pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti
text: Haan, aur mere paas apne future ke decisions lene ka koi hak hi nahi bacha hai. Main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti kyunki usse unki disrespect hogi aur Papa ko bohot hurt hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the feared consequence regarding her father's health and feelings.
text: Kahin na kahin andar ek gehra darr baitha hai ki agar aapne apne liye stand liya, toh us bagawat ka asar aapke Papa ki heart condition par pad jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi kaha aapne. 'Bagawat' word mind mein aate hi ek intense guilt trigger hota hai. Mera padhai karna mujhe achanak selfish lagne laga hai, but ye 24/7 monitoring mujhe bohot suffocate kar rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the ongoing duration and weight of this suffocation.
text: Aage aane wale is poore waqt mein har pal is tarah ki nazar aur dabaav ke beech rehna aapko aandar se ghota ja raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti
text: Bohat jyada. Mujhe library jana hota tha study ke liye, but ab unse permission lene ki himmat nahi hai. Main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti, isliye bas room mein hi ghoont kar baithi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question after two restatements to help her explore her own position in this dynamic.
text: Aise mahaul mein jab aapko apni basic padhai ke liye bhi approval chahiye, toh aap khud ko is sabke beech aakhir kahan dekhti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas ek trapped person ki tarah feel karti hoon. Jiska apna koi wajood nahi. Padhne ka mann karta hai toh bohot gussa aata hai in sab par, par fir foran wahi guilt wapis aa jata hai ki main beti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific underlying feeling of being trapped and helpless when anger is suppressed by duty.
text: Jab apne hi ghar mein apne future ke liye jagah na bache, toh lagta hai ki aap puri tarah se phans gayi hain—ek aisi helplessness jahan kisi par gussa bhi nahi kar sakte kyunki ek aadarsh beti ka farz beech mein aa jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, trapped lagta hai... aur complain karne ka sochu bhi toh family kya sochegi. Bahar bhi toh yahi kahenge ki aajkal ki ladkiyan adjust nahi karti, bas apni padhai ka ghamand hai inko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the stigma cue with a shorter response and trailing pause to validate the fear of judgment.
text: Logon ke is tarah ke taano ka darr aapko aur bhi chup rehne par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Tabhi sab sehna pad raha hai. Andar se lagta hai ki mera career khatam hone wala hai. Family ke hisaab se toh bas achi shaadi hi ekmatra success hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her distress by contextualizing it within societal norms, separating her worth from the marital expectation.
text: Aapka apni padhai ke liye pareshan hona bohot swabhavik hai, khaaskar jab hamari society mein ladkiyon ki value aksar sirf shaadi se jodi jati hai; par aapki mehnat aur sapne aapki asli pehchaan hain, chahe ghar wale abhi use us nazar se na dekh payein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, yeh sunkar thoda better laga. Par sometimes I doubt myself. Mujhe lagne lagta hai ki shayad main hi galat hoon jo itna expect kar rahi hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize her experience and show it's a structural issue, not her personal failing.
text: Hamare yahan parivaaron mein jab beti padhai ke dauran hoti hai, toh achanak se yeh shaadi aur 'expired' hone ka dabaav aana bohut common hai—sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin koi is baare mein khul ke bolta nahi kyunki 'badon ki izzat' sabse upar maani jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi izzat ka darr mujhe hold back kar raha hai. Par mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main aage karun kya? Agar in-laws aa gaye toh meri padhai ka kya hoga? Koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable options that fit her need to study without confronting the family directly.
text: Is bandhan mein bhi hum thodi si jagah nikal sakte hain. Ya toh aap unke aane ke dauran raat ka ek online study schedule bana lein jab family so rahi ho aur monitoring na ho, ya phir aap din mein kisi aisi trusted dost ke ghar combined study ka naam lein jise family achi tarah janti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Night study wala schedule shayad theek rahega. Us waqt sab so jayenge toh koi monitor nahi karega aur mujhe daily kisi se extra permission bhi nahi leni padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a simple, immediate step.
text: Yeh ek bohot hi practical soch hai. Pehle aaj raat apne phone mein un topics ki ek list bana lo jo aap raat mein shanti se akele padh sakti hain... phir bas uske liye ek alarm set kar lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti
text: Theek hai, list aaj hi prepare kar lungi. But mind mein thoda guilt aa raha hai ki main family se chhup kar padhai karungi. Khul kar toh main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her actions as self-preservation rather than rebellion or deceit.
text: Apni padhai ke liye thoda shant waqt nikalna koi dhokha ya bagawat nahi hai, balki apne aap ko bachane ka tarika hai. Aksar aisi situations mein betiyon ki apni mehnat ko galat tarah se selfishness ka naam de diya jata hai, jabki yeh sirf apne future ke liye zaroori kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroori kadam... yeh perspective helpful hai. Padhai karna meri necessity hai, koi crime nahi. Main bas apne dreams ko zinda rakhne ki koshish kar rahi hoon, bina kisi ko hurt kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her strong adherence to duty even while trying to save herself.
text: Aapke andar ek bohot aadarsh beti hai, jo har kadam par yeh dhyaan rakhti hai ki uske aage badhne ki koshish se kisi bhi tarah Papa ki izzat par koi aanch na aaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... kyunki Papa ne mere liye bohot kuch kiya hai life mein. Main bas achanak se unki in-laws wali expectations aur meri books ke collision mein dab gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the abrupt timeline of expectations falling upon her.
text: Itne saalon tak jo ek normal life thi, woh achanak 22 ki hote hi ek timeline ke pressure aur nayi expectations mein badal gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot exhausting hota hai ye. Ek hi din mein future in-laws ke samne perfect bahu banna, aur phir apne assignments complete karna. Energy drain ho jati hai poori.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to reflect on how her chosen safe space feels amidst this drain.
text: In dono alag alag duniya ko handle karne ki thakaan ke baad, jab aap akele apne assignments par focus karengi us raat ke waqt, toh kaisa mehsus hoga aapko?

speaker: Seeker
text: I think thodi shanti milegi. Raat ke us ek-do ghante mein main sirf ek student rahungi, kisi ke through 'monitor' ki hui prospect nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her resilience in carving out space for her identity.
text: Woh raat ke ghante aapke bilkul apne rahenge, aur is bhaari dabaav ke bawajood apne student hone ki identity ko sambhal kar rakhna aapki and اندرूनी mental strength ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe hain. Mujhe at least ye chota sa step consistent rakhna chahiye. Din ki tension se fight karne ke liye raat ka waqt meri ek shield banega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on how this action protects her from being consumed by the relational pressure.
text: Is chote se step ke zariye aap dheere dheere khud ko is rishtey ke dabaav mein poori tarah se kho jaane se bacha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab mujhe pehle jaisi helplessness nahi lag rahi. I mean, ek escape plan hai mere paas, jo strictly meri padhai ke liye hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her ability to balance her role as a daughter and her role as a student.
text: Ek aagyaakari beti hone ka poora farz nibhate hue bhi aapne ek hoshiyar student ki bhumika ko zinda rakhne ka apna ek naya rasta dhoondh liya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti
text: Thank you. Yeh baat theek hai ki main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti, par apne time ko indirectly peacefully manage zaroor kar sakti hoon without starting any fights.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her non-confrontational approach as a valid form of strength.
text: Chup reh kar bina kisi shor ke apna rasta khud banana bhi ek tarah ki himmat hi hoti hai, khaaskar aisi society mein jahan seedhe bolne ko seedha disrespect man liya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul aise hi. Main family ke samne polite rahungi takay Papa tension free rahein, aur raat mein focus apne syllabus par karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to consolidate her new emotional state as the session ends.
text: Apne aane wale kal ki is thodi behtar planning ke baare mein soch kar, abhi theek is pal mein aap kaisa feel kar rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot light feel ho raha hai. Woh deep guilt poori tarah gaya toh nahi hai, par ab darr nahi lag raha. Future ke liye thodi umeed wapas aayi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ending with warm praise for her maturity and courage to keep pursuing her goals.
text: Aaj apne andar ki is bhaari uljhan ko suljhane ke liye aapne bohot maturity dikhayi hai; guilt shayad thoda rahega, par uske bawajood apne sapno ke liye ek rasta nikalna aapki ek bohot badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Maine apne saare sawaal andar hi daba liye hain taaki ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Maine apne saare sawaal andar hi daba liye hain taaki ghar ki shanti bhang na ho. Papa ki 'naak katne' ke darr se main bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon. Woh keh rahe hain ki kundali mil chuki hai aur ab deri karna thik nahi. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the role and duty constraint keeping her silent.
text: Apne ghar walon ki shanti aur izzat banaye rakhne ke chakkar mein, aap apni aawaz ko bilkul khamosh karne par majboor ho gayi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Unko bas yeh lagta hai ki ladki itni badi ho gayi aur abhi tak maike mein baithi hai, toh log kya kahenge. Mere future ya mere career ka kisi ko koi fikar hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of a lost future.
text: Jab sabka poora dhyan sirf samaj ke darr par ho, toh aage chal kar apni life kaise banegi, yeh soch kar ghabrahat aur takleef hona laazmi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, unka sasural mein permanent shift hona mere liye kisi jail se kam nahi lagta. Main try karti hoon permission lene ki for working, par then I just stop myself. It is causing me so much despair.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the duration and cycle of her suppressed attempts.
text: Itne lambe waqt se aap apni feelings express karne ki koshish kar rahi hain, par baar baar aapko khud ko hi rok dena pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Maine apne saare sawaal andar hi daba liye hain taaki ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: It is so suffocating! Kabhi kabhi mann karta hai ki chilla kar bolun ki I don't want this marriage. Par unki age dekh kar, maine apne saare sawaal andar hi daba liye hain taaki ghar ki shanti bhang na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing near-anger as impossibility due to familial duty.
text: Unki health aur unke darr ki wajah se, aap chahte hue bhi khud ki takleef ko zaahir nahi kar paati, isliye ek tarah se andar hi andar bandh gayi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: I just feel so trapped. Main guilty feel karti hoon even soch kar ki main unki wish ke against jaaun. This entire process is completely draining me out.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore the deepest source of her hopelessness.
text: Is helpless aur trapped feeling ke beech, aisi kaun si baat hai jo aapko lagta hai ki aapko sabse zyada hopeless bana rahi hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yehi ki mere paas koi escape route hi nahi hai. Agar main mana karungi toh society unko taane maregi, and I will be blamed. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai bas sab kuch chhod kar kahin door bhaag jaaun is se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the mild risk flag with a normalizing line, then mirroring the heavy duty frame.
text: Aise bhari aur suffocating mahaul mein aisi feelings aana natural hai. Toh aap ek aise dard ko dho rahi hain, jahan ghar ki poori image ka bojh sirf aapke kandho par tika hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes... 'log kya kahenge' ka tag mere astitva se bhi bada ho gaya hai. Main raat-raat bhar so nahi paati hoon, I just cry silently in my room.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing what she tells herself during these isolating moments.
text: Jab raat mein sab shant hota hai aur neend nahi aati, toh aap us akelepan mein apne aap se kya kehti hain khud ko samjhane ke liye?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Maine apne saare sawaal andar hi daba liye hain taaki ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Main khud se yahi kehti hoon ki it is my fate. Mere paas power hi nahi hai, isliye maine apne saare sawaal andar hi daba liye hain taaki ghar ki shanti bhang na ho. I just feel complete despair.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed trapped/helpless feeling appropriate for C3 + Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai ek ajeeb si helplessness aur trapped feeling aa gayi hai, jahan aapne is niyati aur samaj ke pressure ke saamne poori tarah se haar maan li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haar toh maan li hai... Am I a bad daughter for wanting my own freedom instead of just quietly agreeing to this rishta like everyone wants?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling the stigma cue softly by reflecting the relational guilt without questions.
text: Apne khud ke future ke baare mein sochne par aapko andar se guilt mehsoos ho raha hai ki kahin aap apno ko dhoka toh nahi de rahin...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly that guilt. Par agar main chup chaap haan kar doon, toh I will lose myself forever in that sasural. I can't even breathe just thinking about it.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her anxiety as culturally normal and separating her worth from the family's outcome.
text: Tumhare andar yeh ghabrahat aur confusion hona bilkul normal hai. Hamare yahan betiyon par aksar kundali aur shadi ka bohot pressure hota hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki tumhare apne sapne ya career ki desires selfish hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: You are right. I am not being selfish. I just want to live my own life. But mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, main is halat mein ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable choices that don't add new obligations.
text: Do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain hum. Pehla, aaj kisi aisi trusted friend se chat karo jo bina judge kiye sune. Ya doosra, phone ke notes app mein 3 reasons likho ki tumhari pehchan kyun zaroori hai. Inme se kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: I think main phone par wo 3 reasons likh sakti hoon. Friend se shayad main theek se baat nahi kar paungi right now, I might just break down completely.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the note-writing exercise step by step.
text: Pehle apne phone mein naya note kholo, ek gehri saans lo, aur sirf wo 3 basic points bullet mein likh kar save kar lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, I will do that as soon as we finish chatting. Kuch toh apne bare mein sochna padega mujhe, even if it's just safely hidden in my phone notes.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe on why families prioritize marriage over career.
text: Aksar families mein rishto aur kundali ko aage rakha jata hai kyunki ye unki generation ka norm hai, isliye unka pressure tumhari personal failure nahi, balki ek purana structural issue hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: That actually makes sense. Woh intentionally mujhe hurt nahi kar rahe, they are just conditioned that way. But their conditioning is taking away all my choices.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize her situation further.
text: Hamare aas-paas ke parivaro mein, ladkiyon ko age ke taane aur jald shadi ka pressure aana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki biradari aur log kya kahenge ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: True. I have seen my cousins go through this silently. Knowing it is structural makes me feel slightly less guilty about wanting a different life for myself.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her newfound courage by observing others.
text: Apni hi age ki baaki ladkiyon ke struggles dekh kar, aapko is society ke pressure se alag hatne aur thoda sa courage rakhne mein himmat mil rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat aa rahi hai. I think mujhe apne mind mein ek safe space banani padegi. Ki unki baaton ko seedha dil par nahi lena hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her strategy against the feared consequence.
text: Us aane wale darr aur judgement se khud ko bachane ke liye, aap apne mind mein ek shield bana kar apni individuality ko protect karna chah rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aur maine yeh bhi socha hai ki completely silent rehne se better hai main gracefully questions poochun. Without fighting, just stating my facts to Papa.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational balance she intends to maintain.
text: Apne ghar walon ke gusse ya tanaav ko badhaye bina, ahista se aur respect ke sath apni baat aage rakhna aapko thoda control wapas dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. It's the only way I can respect them but also respect myself. Main aaj apne phone mein wo reasons type kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing this gentle approach as a systemic coping tool.
text: Ek dum se chup rehkar pressure jhelne ke bajaye, aese chote aur respectful steps lena, Indian families mein relational peace ko banaye rakhte hue aage badhne ka ek bahut practical way hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. It feels doable. It's not a rebellion, just a conversation that I need to prepare for. Thank you for validating my feelings today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her positive anticipation of the next small step.
text: Kal subah ke us chote se note-writing step ko lekar tumhare andar ek nayi clarity aur thodi si umeed aati dikh rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, mere sir ka bojh kafi halka hua hai. I feel like I finally have a tiny bit of breathing room and hope.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Concluding by mirroring her role and newfound space.
text: Apni responsibility ko samajhte hue bhi, is mushkil mahaul mein apne sapno ke liye thodi jagah banani shuru karna, yeh tumhari hi mehnat ka nateeja hai aaj.

speaker: Seeker
text: Can I say something? I feel so ashamed of myself today. Mummy-Papa ne decide kiya hai ki in-laws ke aane se mera rishta pakka ho jayega aur dowry ka bojh bhi kam hoga. Main college ki topper hoon par aaj unke faisle ke aage sir jhuka diya. Main unhe dukhi nahi dekh sakti, isliye is restricted mobility ko apna naseeb maan kar sab swikar kar liya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring how her relational duty to her parents is overpowering her own ambitions.
text: Aapki baaton se saaf jhalak raha hai ki family ki khushi aur parents ke tanaav ko kam karne ke liye aapne apne topper hone ke sapne aur azaadi ko kinare rakh diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes... like, I feel this deep shame ki main apne liye stand nahi le paayi. Unhone mere liye bahut kurbaniyan di hain na poori life. Toh ab ek aisa rishta aaya hai jisme dowry kam hai, I just had to say yes. Par andar hi andar ghutan hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly naming the implied fear of the consequences of taking a stand against her parents.
text: Yeh baat kehna kitna mushkil hota hai... ek taraf andar ki ghutan hai, aur doosri taraf yeh gehra darr ki agar aapne stand liya toh parents par dahej ka aur kurbaniyon ka kitna bada asar padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Samaj ke taane aur bojh se unko bachana ek achi beti ka kaam hai, right? I feel I shouldn't even complain about my dreams. Main unhe dukhi nahi dekh sakti kisi bhi haalat mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a shorter restatement with a soft pause to respond to her stigma cue about not being allowed to complain.
text: Pichle kuch dino se yeh achi beti banne ka aur kurbaniyon ka bojh aapse apni aawaz aur shikayat dono chheen raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeah, it's just so heavy. Unhone saaf keh diya ki ab rishta pakka hone wala hai toh ghar se bahar jaana aur doston se milna kam karna hoga. Ye restricted mobility mere liye suffocation jaisi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore the specific impact of the lost freedom, arising from her words.
text: Aapne apni azaadi ko apne parents ki ijaazat aur khushi ke piche chhod diya hai. Is achanak aayi bandish aur suffocation mein sabse zyada takleef aapko kis baat ki ho rahi hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse zyada takleef is baat ki hai ki my identity is just gone. College mein I am a topper, a scholar. Yahan main bas ek beti hoon jiska dowry bachana hai. And I feel like a coward kyunki main unhe dukhi nahi dekh sakti, so I just stay quiet.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed 'trapped/helpless' emotion typical of C3 + Relational Preservation.
text: Mujhe lagta hai is poori situation mein jahan aapka college ka rutba aur ghar ki dowry wali sachai aapas mein takra rahe hain, wahan ek bohot gehri 'trapped' wali helplessness mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Trapped is the perfect word! I am completely trapped. It makes me feel pathetic, but then I see my dad's tired face counting expenses and I just can't say anything. I feel so much shame for even thinking of rebelling.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings of being trapped as normal in her culture, separating her worth from the compromise.
text: Apne father ka thaka hua chehra dekh kar apne sapne daba lena, humare yahan ki betiyon mein bahut common aur natural reaction hai. Aapka yeh trapped mehsoos karna aapki weakness ya cowardice nahi, balki family se aapke gehre jude hone ki nishani hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for saying that. Mujhe lagta tha I am just weak. Par naseeb hi aisa hai shayad. Middle class families mein betiyon ka yahi future hota hai. Dowry kam lage, jaldi set ho jayein bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the pressure of dowry and quick marriage without offering solutions.
text: Ghar-ghar ki kahani hai yeh, humare middle-class pariwaron mein yeh betiyon par dowry bachane ka aur jaldi settle hone ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bahar khul kar bolega nahi kyunki sab rishtedaari aur biradari ke tano se darte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein... koi nahi bolta. Sab meri friends bhi shaadi ke liye chupchap ready ho rahi hain without questioning. But this restricted mobility is killing my soul. Main topper hoon, I wanted to do a PhD!

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflict between her role as a student and her duty as a daughter.
text: Ek ho-haar PhD student hone ka lamba sapna aur ek aadarsh beti ban kar sab bandishein chup-chap maan lene ki duty, in dono ke beech aapke andar bahut bada yuddh chal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, and the daughter is winning but the student is dying. Kabhi kabhi gussa aata hai ki kyun paida hui main aisi society mein. Par then again, main unhe dukhi nahi dekh sakti. I just swallow the anger.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the near-anger moment back into her sense of impossibility and relational duty.
text: Apna gussa dawa lena aur apne sapne tod dena shayad aasan lagta hai us takleef ke samne, jo aapke parents ko aapki wajah se bardasht karni padti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Unki takleef mujhse dekhi nahi jayegi kabhi. I just don't know how to survive this mentally. Padhai lagbhag band hone wali hai, rishta pakka hone wala hai. Batao kya karoon main abhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-barrier actionable options that fit within her restricted mobility and duties.
text: Is achanak aayi hui pabandi ke beech apni pehchaan zinda rakhne ke kuch chote kadam uthaye ja sakte hain. Kya aap college mein apni kisi teacher se email par touch mein reh sakti hain, ya phir din mein bas aadha ghanta apne kamre mein apni pasand ki kitaab padhne ka waqt nikal sakti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Teacher se baat karna abhi risk hai, parents ko lagega main aage padhne ki zidd kar rahi hoon. Par haan, I can secretly read my own reference books for 30 minutes in my room. That I can definitely do without hurting anyone.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into immediate small steps to execute today.
text: Yeh chhota sa kadam aapki academic identity ko bilkul zinda rakhega. Pehle yeh karo… apni sabse favourite subject ki kitab nikal kar table par rakho… phir shaam ko room ka darwaza thoda band karke aadha ghanta sirf apne liye padho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, main aaj shaam ko pakka yeh karungi. It sounds small but it feels like it might help me breathe. The shame of giving up entirely was eating me from inside.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the systemic issue of dowry and restricted mobility so she doesn't internalize the shame as personal failure.
text: Aksar humein sikhaya jata hai ki betiyon ka khud ko bhool jana hi unka farz hai, par yeh yaad rakhna zaroori hai ki restricted mobility aur rishte ka bojh samaj ka banaya hua dhancha hai, jisme dahej ke darr se betiyan control ki jaati hain. Yeh aapki kisi tarah ki personal failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: System ka dhancha toh hai, par unfortunately face toh humein hi karna padta hai na daily. But at least reading will remind me of who I truly am. Main apni padhai par bilkul give up nahi karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her realization that she can balance relational duty with maintaining her identity.
text: Parents ki khushi bhi rakhi jaa sakti hai aur us compromise ke beech apni us topper student wali pehchaan ko bhi kitabon ke zariye bachaya jaa sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I hope so. Ab dowry aur in-laws ka pressure toh aayega hi dhire dhire. I will try to smile for my parents kyunki main unhe dukhi nahi dekh sakti, but I'll keep my brain alive behind closed doors.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the prolonged time horizon of her strategy to survive the marriage process.
text: Aage ke is lambe safar mein, jahan shaadi ka dabaav badhega, wahan aap ab apne baahar ke aur andar ke dono hisson ko ek sath lekar chalne ki koshish karne wali hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: It's going to be exhausting, honest bataoon toh. Sometimes I worry I'll just break down and embarrass them. But right now, having this tiny plan feels a bit stabilizing.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her exhaustion while praising her resilience in finding stability.
text: Thakaan hona bilkul laazmi hai is dohari zimmedari mein, aur ghabrahat aana bhi natural hai. Par embarrassment ki parwah kiye bina, aapka apne wajood ko kisi tarah zinda rakhne ka yeh jazba waqai bahut hausle wala kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for understanding. Actually, I was feeling so alone before talking. Like I'm the only girl who is so weak to just accept her 'naseeb' without a big fight.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframing 'naseeb' as a tool used to silence girls.
text: Yeh naseeb ka shabd hi aksar aisi jagah istemaal hota hai taaki betiyan us bojh par sawaal na kar sakein aur shanti se sab maan lein. Is dhakoshle ko samajh jana hi aapki apne darr par pehli jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wow, that makes a lot of sense. They really do use 'naseeb' to silence us, don't they? I will remember this whenever I feel like my existence is just a burden.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief of understanding the systemic nature of her fear.
text: Apne aap ko sirf ek bojh manne ka darr ab thoda kam lag raha hai kyunki aapko is system aur naseeb wali baat ka asli roop samajh aane laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes! It's not my fault at all. Main bas apni family ki situations ko handle kar rahi hoon the best I can without hurting them. I will definitely read tonight. I have to stay connected to my subjects.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her role duty as a daughter balancing her student identity.
text: Ek samjhdaar beti hone ke naate apne farz poore karte hue, aapne lagataar mehnat karke apne us topper student wale hisse ko bhi ek nayi disha dedi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I really have. Do you think I should also maybe talk to my older sister about this? She went through the exact same rishta process two years ago. Maybe she knows how to handle the anxiety.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Supporting her idea with an actionable way to reach out safely.
text: Apni behen se is baare mein baat karna sach mein ek bohot acha aur surakshit sahara ban sakta hai. Kya aaj sham ko hi use bas ek chota sa message bhej kar pooch sakti hain ki use aapse akele baat karne ka waqt kab milega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeah, message karna bilkul safe rahega, I don't want mom to overhear right now. I will text her right away. I actually feel a lot lighter now. Thank you so much for listening.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her proactive steps and reinforcing her strength at the close.
text: Apne liye yeh sahara dhoondhna aur padhai zinda rakhna aapka bahut bada faisla hai. Mujhe khushi hai ki aap is poori uljhan mein bhi apni awaaz ko dubne nahi de rahi hain.
